text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our debut race is coming up. Once that's behind
us, we need to decide on Jordan's race schedule,
so...
choice_data_list: What races do you want to run in?
What races do you want to run in?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Beats me. I'll leave that to you.
choice_data_list: Well, what are your goals, then?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Uh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's starting to get overwhelmed, but having a
concrete goal will help with her daily motivation
and growth.
choice_data_list: (I'd love if she could realize that for herself.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I might have one.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Welllll...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I wanna make it big!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gives me a goal as vague and formless as a
passing cloud in the sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And now, the day of her debut race has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan is waiting restlessly in the prep
room, fidgeting with her nails in between sips of
water.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: N-not at all! I'm totally gravy...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Come in!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey! I came to cheer you on! Are you loose and
limber?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Palmer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I've got a message from City and the others too.
They said to tell you, "This is the real deal, so
bring back a victory!"

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: The real deal...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But what if I...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: U-uh, never mind. It's nothing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: ...Really?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might be easier to discuss a problem with just
your friends sometimes...
choice_data_list: I'm gonna step outside for a second.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Sure thing! Take your time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: So? What's up, Jordan?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Palmer... I'm scared. This is the real deal!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Like, the real deal. I always thought I'd be way more badass when the time came!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I even told my trainer I was gonna make it big!
But I... I...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
What if it's like back before I met my trainer, and
I can't run right...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
If you're really scared, and it's too much for you,
you can always just run away.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but your eyes just now told me that running
away isn't an option.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you're honestly terrified, but your need to
test yourself is even stronger.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you want to see if this stronger you can
finally perform in the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The whole reason we train every day is so we can
run in races, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So take all that practice you've done up until now
and use those legs of yours to win this!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Besides! Even if you mess up, you just run in a
maiden race next! Actually, that's what I did!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's surprisingly okay! It gets you pretty pumped in
its own way. No lie, it might be worth trying at
least once.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
What?! The whole reason I want to win is to avoid
that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, sorry. You mad? My bad, fam.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But you should hold onto that feeling until you
cross the finish line. You'll be fine—you got this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Your trainer and I will both be watching you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Even if you do mess up this one time, I'll always be cheering for you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: You're my girl, after all. And your trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Well, you said yourself your trainer is probably
good for you. That means you work well together,
right? At least a little.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Palmer...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. I'm heading to the paddock.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Yup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tosen Jordan steps out into her debut race.
